3135270.name: Slasher
3135270.description:
Slasher is a Retro third person multiplayer thriller game where you play as either a civilian or the Slasher. Run, hide and outlast the other players while being hunted by the Slasher. A random player chosen to be the Slasher must hunt down and eliminate the other players before time runs out. Unlock new Slasher skins after winning matches to customize your killer. Choose from four different maps to play in, The Suburbs, The Offices, The School and The Camp.

A five minute timer starts off the round, the slasher must find and take out all other players before the time is up. The slasher can only take out other players with weapons scattered around the map. The weapons last only once, except for the rare chainsaw. Swimming is also a way to take out other players, swim close and drag them under.

Host a game for anyone to join, or use a password and search key so that only friends can join.

More maps, and game modes are coming in the future.

A single player mode is also included, so that offline play is possible.
